stemHtml: An aircraft is on final approach for a CAT II ILS. As the aircraft starts down the glide path, the driver of a ground vehicle passes a hold marker without clearance and enters the ILS sensitive area. The ILS monitoring system shuts down the ILS signal and the crew execute a missed approach. This would happen if the monitoring system detects too much of which of the following options?

options.a: A change in the magnetic variation in the ILS sensitive area.
options.b: A shift in the LOC or GP course.
